title: Bundle
description: OEM Tracker data contract. contract_version 1.1.0 (Bundle.meta added; ContractRow frozen since 1.0.0). One tidy row per observation (long format). The bundle is the artifact the UI reads. See docs/contract-coverage.md for the widget->field mapping and the non-negotiable rules.

contract_version.description: Contract version. 1.1.0 added the Bundle.meta wrapper object; ContractRow is unchanged from 1.0.0.

generated_at.description: When this bundle was built. Injected by the builder; never derived from wall-clock inside pure logic.

source_universe_label.description: Human label for share denominators. For SIAM: 'Share within reported SIAM universe'. Lives in the contract, never hardcoded in UI.

meta.description: Bundle-level provenance/freshness metadata (added in 1.1.0). Surfaces coverage and the latest available period so the UI can label freshness loudly.

BundleMeta.title: BundleMeta
BundleMeta.description: Bundle wrapper metadata. Does not touch the frozen ContractRow grain.

category.description: Category scope of this bundle, e.g. '2W'. Null if the bundle spans multiple categories.

source.description: The single source this bundle was built from (one source per bundle).

coverage_start.description: Earliest period_date present (first day of period).

latest_period.description: Latest period_date present (first day of period). The UI's freshness anchor.

snapshot_id.description: The immutable snapshot this bundle was built from.

row_count.description: Number of rows in the bundle.

notes.description: Freeform provenance note (e.g. 'Data ends Dec-2025; no live feed until Phase 2').

ContractRow.title: ContractRow
ContractRow.description: One observation. Long format: never one column per month. 0 and null are DISTINCT (0 = source-reported zero / not-launched; null = not reported). Never sum across inclusive dimension values (powertrain all>=ev; flow total>=domestic+export).

period_date.description: First day of the period, e.g. 2026-06-01.

fiscal_year.description: Fiscal year Apr-Mar, e.g. 'FY26' = Apr 2025 - Mar 2026.

fiscal_quarter.description: e.g. 'Q1FY26' = Apr-Jun 2025. Null for yearly rows.

category.description: Vehicle category. A dimension, never an assumption. v1 seeds 2W but the contract holds all.

company_raw.description: Exactly as it appeared in the source. Kept so a bad mapping is always traceable and reversible.

flow.description: Different measurements, not variants of 'sales'. total >= domestic + export; never sum total with its parts.

powertrain.description: Source reports 'all' and 'ev' (ev is a SUBSET of all). 'ice' is DERIVED = all - ev. Never sum across these values.

metric.description: What is measured. Extensible (e.g. 'value') later without a breaking change to consumers.

value.description: The measurement. 0 and null are DISTINCT and must never be coerced into each other.

source.description: On every row. Enforces the one-source-per-table rule and encodes measurement basis (SIAM=wholesale dispatches, VAHAN=registrations) via metrics.yaml.

source_file.description: The dropped source file this row came from (audit trail).

source_period.description: The period the source file reports as-of.

native_frequency.description: What the source ACTUALLY reported. CV is quarterly-native; everything else monthly-native.

calc_status.description: reported = literal from source. derived = summed M->Q->Y OR ice = all - ev.

revision.description: 0,1,2... A newer file correcting an old period writes revision+1 and supersedes the old row.

is_superseded.description: True once a newer revision replaces this row. Never delete; always supersede.

is_partial.description: True for an incomplete period (YTD / QTD / running month). Drives the 'YTD'/'Quarter to date' labels.

periods_present.description: Constituent sub-periods actually present in a derived aggregate (e.g. 2 months of a quarter). Null when reported/complete.

periods_expected.description: Constituent sub-periods a complete aggregate would have (e.g. 3 for a quarter). Null when reported/complete.
